title: lycianthes lenta subsp. lambii
intro: Lycianthes lenta subsp. lambii, also known as Lamb's passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a sedative and antispasmodic, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Lycianthes lenta subsp. lambii include its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its use as a treatment for various neurological disorders. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
